base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of radar_ui — a ui from 1998 metal gear solid. Soliton Radar + guard-cone view + alert/caution states. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Soliton Radar + guard-cone view + alert/caution states
